helpful: The provisioned petition supplied the complete legal and factual theory.
CourtListener exposed directly adverse published circuit authority.
The statpack separated the paid-petition and Ninth Circuit base rates.
gaps: A base-rate cut conditioned on a Supreme Court response request would improve calibration.
CourtListener did not return the related Supreme Court dockets by party-name search.
notes: The live opinion search was materially useful; generic corpus priors would not have been issue-matched, so no corpus query was run.
